chat.no_config_tip: Add an AI endpoint from Settings in the sidebar, or paste an endpoint/API key into the chat.
chat.continue_pickup: Continue — pick up where it left off
chat.stop_stalled: Stop the stalled stream and ask it to continue
chat.api_key_warning:
This looks like an API key. Sending it to the AI could expose it.

Did you mean to use /setup instead?
chat.nothing_to_resend: Nothing to resend — message has no text and no attachments yet (try again after the upload finishes).
chat.no_user_message: Could not find the user message to regenerate
chat.nothing_to_regenerate: Nothing to regenerate — the user message has no text and no attachments
chat.cannot_edit_no_id: Cannot edit: message ID not found
chat.research_timeout: Research clarification timed out. Toggle research again to start over.
chat.no_chat_session:
No chat session active. You can:

- Open the model picker in the chat box and pick a model
- Use the + button in the model picker to add a model endpoint
- Use /help to see all available commands

models.local_server_offline: Local server appears offline: {reason}. Click to try anyway, or relaunch in Cookbook.
models.type_setup_hint: Type /setup for Local models or API setup.
models.ask_admin_configure: Ask an admin to configure model endpoints
models.welcome_setup_html: Type /setup to get started.
models.welcome_tip_setup: Type /setup, then choose Local models or API.
models.tip_long_press_session: Tip: Long-press a session for rename, delete, and memory options.
models.tip_nobody_mode: Tip: Tap the eye icon for Nobody mode - no history saved.
models.tip_agent_mode: Tip: Switch to Agent mode when you want tools.
models.tip_attach_button: Tip: Attach images or files using the + button next to the input.
models.tip_ctrl_k_search: Tip: Press Ctrl+K to search across all your conversations.
models.tip_ctrl_b_sidebar: Tip: Press Ctrl+B to quickly toggle the sidebar.
models.tip_shift_click_sidebar: Tip: Shift-click the sidebar toggle to swap it to the other side.
models.tip_drag_drop_files: Tip: Drag and drop files onto the chat to attach them.
models.tip_right_click_session: Tip: Right-click a session for rename, delete, and memory options.

modal.drag_to_resize_email: Drag to resize email and draft

theme.title: Theme
theme.max_themes: Max {max} custom themes. Delete one first.

compare.title: Model Comparison
compare.description: Select models to compare side-by-side. Send the same prompt to all.
compare.blind_title: Blind Mode — hide model names until you vote
compare.parallel_title: Parallel — run all models at once vs one at a time
compare.shuffle_title: Shuffle — randomly pick models for each slot
compare.save_title: Save — keep sessions after closing compare
compare.probe_title: Probe unverified models with a small test request
compare.uncheck_hint: Uncheck models to exclude them from random shuffle. They can still be picked manually.
compare.no_votes_yet: No {mode} votes yet. Run a comparison and vote!
compare.cost_estimate_title: Estimated cost per 1,000 responses like this one
compare.timed_out_incomplete: Timed out after {seconds}s — response may be incomplete

cookbook.rebuild_cleared: Cleared llama.cpp build on {where}. Re-launch the serve task to rebuild with GPU support.
cookbook.hf_repo_hint: Enter a full HuggingFace repo ID like "org/model-name", or an Ollama name like "qwen2.5:14b".

notes.title: Notes
notes.label_reminders_title_on: Showing only reminders — click to show all
notes.label_reminders_title_off: Hiding reminders — click to show only reminders
notes.label_clear_past_title: Delete reminders whose time has passed
notes.empty_all_caught_up: All caught up — no pending goal steps right now.
notes.open_agent_chat: Open the agent's chat for this note
notes.agent_nothing: Nothing to solve — note is empty
notes.agent_working: Agent working in background — tap the Agent tag when ready
notes.add_text: Add text — click to cycle size

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.delete_confirm: Delete {n} task(s)? This cannot be undone.
tasks.ai_placeholder: Describe a task — e.g. "every weekday 7am summarize my unread email"
tasks.urgent_placeholder: What should count as urgent? e.g. deadlines, blockers, people waiting outside.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.delete_calendar_confirm: Delete calendar “{name}” and all its events?

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.delete_photo_confirm: Delete this photo? This cannot be undone.
gallery.delete_album_confirm: Delete album “{name}”? Photos inside will stay in your library.
gallery.delete_albums_confirm: Delete {n} album(s)? Photos inside will stay in your library.

library.title: Library
library.delete_chats_confirm: Delete {n} chat(s)? This cannot be undone.

cookbook.title: Cookbook
cookbook.gpu_pool_title: Which GPU pool to serve from — vLLM can only tensor-parallel across identical GPUs
cookbook.download_first: Download the model first, then configure from Serve tab
cookbook.invalid_ssh_target: Use a plain SSH target like user@host and an optional numeric port.
cookbook.server_not_responding_detail: Server not responding - running serve may have crashed
cookbook.stalled_click_retry: Click to retry — resumes where it stopped
cookbook.retrying_toast: Download interrupted — retrying ({n}/{m}), resumes where it stopped…
cookbook.confirmed_working: Confirmed working — this config launched and registered an endpoint

research.title: Deep Research
research.description: Deep multi-step research with source gathering and synthesis.
research.past_research_hint: All past research found in <button type="button" class="research-library-link">Library, Research</button>

email.no_other_emails: No other emails from this sender in {folder}.

skills.no_skills_yet: No skills yet, use agent for it to auto extract them.
skills.publish_hint: Publish — appears in the skills index
skills.test_title: Test this skill — run it + AI judge
skills.audit_prompt: Audit {label}? Each is tested from top to bottom, then published or moved to draft using your auto-approve confidence threshold.

presets.persistent_chat_notice: Persistent chat — persona is locked. Style, temperature, and memory can still be changed.
presets.custom_settings_active: Custom settings active — click to configure

settings.title: Settings
settings.test_tts_text: Hello, this is a test of text to speech.
settings.test_reminder_body: This is a test reminder to verify your settings are working.
settings.server_list_retry: Authorization timed out. Reconnect from the server list to retry.
settings.no_contacts_hint: Failed to load contacts (check CardDAV config above).
settings.need_name_or_email: Need at least a Name or Email

admin.title: Admin
admin.revoke_token_confirm: Revoke this API token? External integrations using it will stop working.
admin.wipe_all_confirm: Wipe ALL {label}? This cannot be undone.
admin.wipe_really_confirm: Really wipe every one of your {label}?

incognito.label: Nobody
incognito.enable: Enable Nobody mode — no memory, no history saved
incognito.welcome_tip: Temporary session — won't be saved and no memory activation.

web.desc: Searches the web for relevant information to include in the response. Results are fetched and summarized before the AI answers.

bash.desc: Gives the AI access to a sandboxed shell for running commands, installing packages, and executing scripts. Use with caution.

builder.desc: Create custom mini-apps and tools the AI can use. Describe what you need and the AI will build a tool you can reuse across conversations.

research.desc: Multi-round web search with source analysis. Takes longer but produces comprehensive, well-sourced answers. Your next message will trigger a deep research cycle.

notification.session_rename_prompt: Please enter a name for the session
notification.ai_rename_prompt: Please enter a name for the AI

login.title: Odysseus — Login
login.first_time_setup: First-time setup — create your admin account
login.password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

sessions.delete_session_confirm_n: Delete {n} session(s)? This cannot be undone.
sessions.delete_folder_confirm: Delete folder "{name}" and all {n} session(s) inside it?

document.tab_unlink: Unlink from chat (kept in the Library)
document.editor_placeholder: Start typing or paste text to create a document...
document.pdf_export_bottom_hint: Jump to the last page (signature fields are usually here)
document.pdf_export_summary: {filled} of {total} fields filled. Review and adjust below before downloading.
document.pdf_ai_fill_prompt: What should the AI fill in?\n(e.g. "My name is Jane Doe, address 123 Main St, dob 1990-01-15")
document.email_reply_title: Reply to the sender with this filled file attached
document.email_receive_only_warning: Selected email account is receive-only; using your SMTP account.
document.toolbar_add_text_box: Add text box (then click on PDF)

group.need_two_participants: Need at least 2 participants — add models or characters

rag.drop_to_add: Drop files above to add to RAG
rag.drop_or_click: Drop files here or click to upload

assistant.describe_placeholder: Describe the assistant's personality, tone, and behavior...

editor.fill_prompt: What to fill the masked area with...
